title: geraniospermum trifidum
intro: Geraniospermum trifidum, also known as the three-lobed geraniospermum, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Menispermaceae. The plant's roots, leaves, and stems are used in traditional medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Geraniospermum trifidum are said to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and the dried plant material can also be used in traditional remedies.
